title: The Bouncing Floofers of the Golden Cloud
summary: Seeker, Hattie the Mouse, and the Crystal Mountain Caretaker use a golden sparkling potion to teleport to the Floofer Cloud. Upon arrival, they discover a land of soft ground and golden mist inhabited by Floofers—small, bouncy creatures that resemble living pom-poms. After meeting the energetic Ziggety Ziggety Zack, the group realizes the Floofers are exhausted but cannot stop jumping long enough to rest. By singing a gentle lullaby, they help the creatures finally fall asleep before using a return potion to travel back to Seeker's home.

highlightQuote.text: Maybe the Fluffer cloud? No, the Floofer cloud.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's tell a Seeker story.
A Seeker story. Oh, that's a great idea. Now, once upon a time...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And Seeker said, "Who is it?" "It's the Crystal Mountain caretaker, Seeker."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hello Crystal Mountain caretaker. What brings you to my house today?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I brought my friend Hattie the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hello Hattie. Nice to see you again. Now, I'm glad you're both here because I have a lot of new potions to test out in my potion closet. Would you like to try one with me today? They're all teleportation potions. Now, come on inside and see. Hmm, now this is a purple swirly one and here's a green glittery one. Oh, this one's a yucky mucky one and this one has golden sparkles in it.
The golden sparkles one.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, now where do you think that one might take us to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe the Fluffer cloud? No, the Floofer cloud.
The Floofer cloud? The Floofer cloud. What do you think is there?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Floofers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the Floofers. I'd love to meet a Floofer, said Seeker. Let's try it. Now, as you'll recall, we have to each take a sip of this sparkly golden potion and then say the rhyme three times and that will take us to the Floofer cloud.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's do it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: One so manya know, one so manya know, one so manya know.
One so manya know, one so manya know, one so manya know. And then there was a floop!
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker and Hattie and... um... and wait, who... wait, who showed up at Seeker's house?
Hattie and the caretaker.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh yeah, the caretaker. Seeker and Hattie and the caretaker of Crystal Mountain... dad, where did you put the blue timer?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Oh, it's over there. Okay, okay, you take this. Thank you. I'll take that card. Where are you going? Oh, please don't change the time, we need to use it to measure the time. Down, sit down. Okay.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I was just seeing how much blue was left.

Oh yeah, we have a few more minutes. So, Seeker and Hattie and the caretaker of Crystal Mountain suddenly vanished in a poof and they reappeared floof! In the land of the Floofers. And there was a golden sparkly mist all around. Floofer, Floofer, where are you, Floofer?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And Hattie was asking "Where are you Floofers?"
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Seeker was looking around at the ground and saying "Oh my goodness, it's a very soft fluffy ground here in the land of the Floofers. And everything's golden sparkly just like in the potion. I wonder, I wonder what the Floofers are. What kind of creatures do you think that they are?"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie, caretaker...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the caretaker says "Oh, Floofers, I've heard of those. I think they're relatives of my friend Frazgle. Frazgle, Frazgle, I'm going to call you. Hello Frazgle, are you there?"
Frazgle, Frazgle, I'm going to call you. Hello Frazgle, are you there?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, oh, uh, hello... rraaarr! Have you ever seen a Floofer? Oh yeah, those are my cousins. Rraaarr! They're crazy, those Floofers. They're really small and they're a lot like little pom-poms but they're alive and they can jump really high. That's a Floofer. Rraaarr!
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And they're small?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: That's right.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Very good. And they can jump so high. Seeker, those are what Floofers are. They're very small.

And Hattie said "Hey, hey, hey! What's that over there? I see something shooting straight up in the air. Oh wait, it's coming back down... pshoo... and a tiny little golden sparkly puffball floated right down in front of the caretaker of Crystal Mountain's feet. And he bobbed his little rainbow colored head down on it and said 'Oh, hello there. Are you a Floofer?' And what did the Floofer say?"
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I'm a caretaker of Crystal Mountain. Hi, what's your name?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And the Floofer said "Oh hi, I'm a Floofer. My name is Ziggety Ziggety Zack. And I like to bounce. Do you want to see me bounce? Yeah. Watch this! Boing! Pshoo... bonk! How did I do? Was that good? I think it was pretty good. I'm going to do it again. Boing! Bonk bonk bonk. Hey, I have a lot of friends here. We can all bounce a lot, but we're getting kind of tired. And it's a bit of a problem because we don't want to go to sleep but we're really tired. What do you think we should do? Oh wait, I have to bounce again. Boing! Pshoo... and suddenly from high in the sky, there were dozens more Floofers and they all came zooming down. Bzzz... boing! Bzzz... boing! And Hattie said 'We're surrounded by Floofers! This is amazing!' But all of the Floofers suddenly landed in a little bunch in front of everyone and Seeker said 'Oh dear, look at them. They're so tired. Are you yawning little Floofers?' and they said 'Yawn... we're so sleepy but we just want to bounce. Can you help us go to sleep?'"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, maybe by a lullaby.
Rock-a-bye Floofers, you're so tired this day, you could maybe take a nap, for now, then you can bounce some more, no more after nap...
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Rock-a-bye Floofers, you're so tired this day, you could maybe take a nap, for now, then you can bounce some more, no more after nap...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And suddenly they were all around. There were tiny little yawns. Yawn, yawn, yawn. And all the Floofers started to go to sleep and they heard tiny little zzz-zzz-zzz sounds because all the Floofers were going to sleep. And Seeker said 'Well, that was a wonderful lullaby. And I think we should be very quiet now because they're sleeping and our work here is done. Here, here's the going home potion. Glug glug glug glug.' And everybody drank the potion and they went back to Seeker's house. And that's the end of our story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, don't shine the light in my eyes.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Crystal Mountain Caretaker
characters.description: A mysterious companion and frequent subject of Seeker’s sketches, this enigmatic friend often arrives in the quiet company of Hattie the Mouse.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Frazgle
characters.description: A growly relative of the Floofers who describes them as living pom-poms.

characters.name: The Floofers
characters.description: Tiny, pom-pom-like, and irrepressibly bouncy, these magical ball-shaped denizens of the Floofer Clouds leap with wide-eyed grace across resilient, vaporous peaks. Sustained by a vital dependency on floof-berries, these restless creatures possess a staggering verticality and a vibrant energy so potent that falling asleep remains an elusive feat.

characters.name: Ziggety Ziggety Zack
characters.description: A specific, highly energetic Floofer who loves to bounce but struggles with exhaustion.

places.name: Seeker's House
places.description: Perched at the edge of a mountain, this warm stone sanctuary—Seeker’s original residence and whimsical home shared with Uncle Crisco—has evolved from a secret vault into the purring, chaotic heart of a massive feline gala. Within its well-lit halls where Muppets gather for snacks and scientific discussions, lies a special hidden closet where Seeker brews an enchanted collection of potions that shimmer in every imaginable color.

places.name: Crystal Mountain
places.description: The caretaker’s secluded dwelling serves as a hallowed sanctuary where magical birds descend to harvest the luminous crystals essential for their flight.

places.name: Floofer Cloud
places.description: A distant and storied realm, this ancestral cradle serves as the Floofers' original sanctuary—a soft, fluffy, and sparkly world of profound comfort. Draped in the downy materials from which their gentle lineage first emerged, it remains a shimmering environment where they live and play.
